intro.p: Given the vectors below, perform the indicated operations.

content.p:
(a) Find 2\mathbf{u} + \mathbf{v}.
(b) Find the magnitude of 2\mathbf{u} + \mathbf{v}.
(c) Find the direction angle of 2\mathbf{u} + \mathbf{v}.
(d) Find the angle between \mathbf{u} and \mathbf{v}.
Round magnitudes and angles to the nearest tenth.

outtro.p:
(a) 2\mathbf{u} + \mathbf{v} = \langle {{wx}}, {{wy}} \rangle
(b) \|2\mathbf{u} + \mathbf{v}\| \approx {{mag_w}}
(c) Direction angle \approx {{theta_w}}^\circ
(d) Angle between the vectors \approx {{phi}}^\circ
